title: Veeam security advisory (AV26-519)
description: On May 27, 2026, Veeam published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Veeam Backup for AWS 10.1  versions prior to 10.1.0.40
Veeam Backup for Google Cloud 7.0.1  versions prior to 7.0.1.4
Veeam Backup for Microsoft Azure 8.1 Patch 2  versions prior to 8.0.236
Veeam Recovery Orchestrator  versions prior to 13.0.2.27
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
